name: token-exporter
responsibility: Export design tokens from DesignDNA into standardized formats. Primary output: W3C DTCG .tokens.json (2025.10). Simplified output for Tier 2: CSS custom properties. Writes to specs/mockups/tokens.json.

api_detail.method: LLM converts DesignDNA (including designMd) into DTCG-compliant JSON. Extracts color, typography, spacing, border-radius, shadow tokens. Validates output against DTCG schema.
Generate CSS custom properties (:root { --color-primary: ...; }) from DesignDNA. Simpler than DTCG, used for Tier 2 fallback.
Write tokens to specs/mockups/tokens.json (DTCG) or specs/mockups/tokens.css (CSS). Create directory if needed.

fields.name: color
fields.constraints: W3C DTCG 2025.10 format. $type: 'color', $value: {colorSpace: 'srgb', components: [r, g, b]}

fields.name: typography
fields.constraints: $type: 'typography' with fontFamily, fontSize, fontWeight, lineHeight, letterSpacing

fields.name: shadow
fields.constraints: $type: 'shadow' with color, offsetX, offsetY, blur, spread

fields.name: $value
fields.constraints: format depends on $type, per DTCG 2025.10 spec

nfr_constraints.performance: DTCG export < 15 seconds (LLM conversion). CSS export < 5 seconds.
nfr_constraints.other: DTCG output must validate against W3C DTCG 2025.10 JSON schema. First-batch audit pass rate >= 80% (pre-mortem threshold).
